item.title: React + Next.js with Docker
item.description:
Following my previous post on Vuejs + Nuxt.js with Docker, I will show you how to dockerize a React + Next.js web application.

React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces. Next.js is a framework for building React applications. Docker is a containerization platform that can be used to package and deploy these applications.

item.title: Vue.js + Nuxt with Docker
item.description:
Vue.js and Nuxt are powerful frameworks for building web applications. Docker is a containerization platform that can be used to package and deploy these applications.

To dockerize a Nuxt application, a Dockerfile is created that specifies the steps required to build the image. This typically includes installing Nuxt and the application’s dependencies.
